summary: Completed testing of GrowthSystemPage redesign and ottimizzazione backend endpoints. All backend tests passed (7/7). Frontend tests passed - all new UI features working correctly including diagnostic block, level cards with problema/soluzione/target blocks, CTA buttons with confirmation, and reality block.
critical_code_review_comments: GrowthSystemPage correctly implements all new sections: hero, diagnostic block, level cards, reality block
Diagnostic block 'Dove sei oggi?' shows 3 scenarios (A, B, C) with proper visual selection (checkmark, border)
Level cards correctly show problema (red), soluzione (green), target (blue) blocks when expanded
Auto-expand of recommended level works when scenario is selected
'PER TE' badge appears on recommended level after scenario selection
CTA buttons work and display confirmation message 'Hai scelto il livello [name]'
Reality block 'Cosa succede se non fai nulla' displays with dark background
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/{partner_id} returns correct data structure
Backend POST /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/salva-protocollo saves and persists checklist correctly
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GrowthSystemPage fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Vista Partner' tab → Expand 'CRESCITA CONTINUA' in sidebar → Click 'Evolution Growth System'. Page features: 1) Diagnostic block with 3 scenarios (A/B/C), 2) Level cards (Foundation/Growth/Scale) with expand/collapse, 3) Problema/Soluzione/Target blocks in each level, 4) CTA buttons with confirmation, 5) Reality block at bottom. Backend endpoints tested: GET /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/{partner_id} and POST /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/salva-protocollo.
